title: evolvulus alsinoides var. villosus
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. villosus, commonly known as Dwarf Blue Sage or Villossus Evolvulus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus alsinoides var. villosus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and providing relief from respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Evolvulus alsinoides var. villosus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
